ModMetaData.name: I got hit！
ModMetaData.author: Bee1Hell
ModMetaData.description:
Adds an Adrenaline Rush system. When a humanlike pawn is hit and in pain above 20%, adrenaline kicks in with 5 stages of effects — dulling pain, altering mobility, manipulation, sight, and rest rate. The rush lasts 2 hours, followed by a 1-day cooldown before it can trigger again.
为游戏增添了肾上腺素飙升机制。当人形角色被击中且疼痛高于20%时触发，分为5个阶段产生不同效果——影响疼痛、移动能力、操作能力、视觉能力和休息速率。效果持续2小时，随后进入1天的冷却期。
